channel.title: GitHub Assembly Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Assembly in GitHub

item.title: leachim6/hello-world
item.description: Hello world in every computer language. Thanks to everyone who contributes to this, make sure to see contributing.md for contribution instructions!

item.title: riscv/riscv-arch-test
item.description: The RISC-V Architectural Certification Tests (ACTs) are a set of assembly language tests designed to certify that a design faithfully implements the RISC-V specification.
